title: Project
description: v0 DRAFT. A unit of work for a customer. Verticals map their primary work object into this (roofing: "job" -> project). status is the small core enum every dashboard can rely on; status_detail carries the vertical's native stage verbatim. RECONCILE(doc-04/05): field list and the job-status state machine mapping.

status.description: Core lifecycle status. This enum is frozen within v1; verticals map their native stages onto it and put the native stage in status_detail.

status_detail.description: Vertical-specific stage, free-form (e.g. "build_scheduled", "supplement_pending"). Dashboards display it verbatim; they MUST NOT branch on it.

contract_value.description: Current contract/estimate value; null before quoting.
